figures.caption: Figure 6: Electrochemical insertion energy of an additional Li atom at different atomic layers (𝑁) on the Li3OCl side of the Li|Li3OCl interface. Positive energies indicate energetically unfavorable Li insertion and thus electrochemical stability, whereas negative energies suggest favorable Li incorporation near the interface.
